step_rationale: Atherogenic lipoproteins retained in intima; direct foam cell formation.
mechanism: Remnant lipoproteins accumulate in the subendothelial space and drive foam cell formation, initiating atherosclerotic plaque.

references.title: [Front line of oxidized lipoproteins: role of oxidized lipoproteins in atherogenesis and cardiovascular disease risk].
references.journal: Rinsho byori. The Japanese journal of clinical pathology
